title: Copy/Paste column data

posts.author: Brooke (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m currently using a ‘contacts’ set up in my Monday, and am wondering if I’m able to bulk copy/paste the data from that column within Monday?

I know it works to load the data in, but I can’t seem to bulk pull it once its there

The end goal is to copy lists of contacts for batch emailing outside of Monday

Thanks!!
